title: DiscretionaryFundingAward
description: A discretionary funding award made by the Queens Borough President — tens of millions of dollars each year in capital funding and programmatic (expense) funding to city agencies, nonprofits, cultural institutions, and public/charter schools serving Queens. NO public API and NO QBP Open Data twin today; the application and award live only as HTML on queensbp.nyc.gov/budget (citywide rollups exist elsewhere in Checkbook NYC / Council discretionary data under other labels).

fiscalYear.description: City fiscal year of the award (e.g. 'FY2026').

recipient.description: Organization or institution receiving the award.

recipientType.description: Type of recipient eligible for QBP discretionary funding.

purpose.description: What the funding is for (project or program description).
